zh.lifeSummary: 當Jacobus de Banastre於大約1238年出生在英國爾莫利頓時，他的父親Robert de Banastre-2歲，母親Alice Woodcock-2歲。他於1256年與Ellen Butler在英國藍卡爾沃爾頓 奧 馮 希爾結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1292年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jacobus de Banastre于大约1238年出生在英国爾莫利頓时，他的父亲Robert de Banastre-2岁，母亲Alice Woodcock-2岁。他于1256年与Ellen Butler在英国藍卡爾沃爾頓 奧 馮 希爾结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1292年在英国英格兰藍卡爾享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jacobus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the biblical name Yaakov; see Jacob .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Jacobus de Banastre was born about 1238, in Mollington, Cheshire, England, his father, Robert de Banastre, was -2 and his mother, Alice Woodcock, was -2. He married Ellen Butler in 1256, in Walton on the Hill, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died in 1292, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

ja.lifeSummary: Jacobus de Banastreが約1238年にイギリスチェシュアイアモリントンで生まれた時，父Robert de Banastreは-2歳，母Alice Woodcockは-2歳であった。1256年にイギリスランカシュアイアワルトン オン ス ヒルでEllen Butlerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1292年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jacobus de Banastre(이)가 대략 1238년 영국 체실르 모링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Banastre(은)는 -2세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Woodcock(은)는 -2세였다. 그는 1256년 영국 랭카실르 월턴  테 힐에서 Ellen Butler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1292년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jacobus de Banastre родился около 1238 г. в местности моллингтон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Banastre было -2 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Woodcock, -2. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen Butler в 1256 г. в местности валтон он т хилл, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер в 1292 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет.
